response.step_by_step_log: Watched the entire video to identify vocal content. The audio consists entirely of instrumental background music throughout all segments. As there is no vocal music, no lyrics searches were performed.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional showcase for the Hololive English 'All For One' 3rd Concert, featuring merchandise details, visitor information, and fan support messages. The entire video is accompanied by an instrumental electronic background track. No vocal music is present.

scenes.description: Intro graphic for 'On the Run!' hololive English Advent 2nd Anniversary Live. Instrumental music playing.
'It's Ollie's holoplus ZOM-RAID TIME' promotional slide with instrumental music.
'hololive English 3rd Concert ALL FOR ONE' title card with instrumental music.
'Attention For Visitors' slide with instrumental music.
Merchandise showcase slides with instrumental music.
Fan messages screen with scrolling content and instrumental music.
